error.signature: Shader error in 'Custom/MyShader': failed to open source file at line 42
error.regex: (Shader error|Shader compilation|failed to open source file|maximum.*texture.*interpolators|maximum.*ALU|syntax error.*shader|Program.*vert.*frag.*not found)

verdict.summary: Shader compilation failed. Syntax error, exceeding GPU limits, or missing include file.

dead_ends.action: Switch to a more powerful GPU to fix shader compilation limits
dead_ends.why_fails: Shader instruction limits are per-platform target, not the development GPU. Target platform determines limits.

dead_ends.action: Copy shader code from older Unity tutorials
dead_ends.why_fails: Shader API changes between Unity versions. Old surface shader code may not compile in newer versions.

workarounds.action: Check the Console for the exact error line and fix the shader syntax
Use Shader Graph (visual editor) instead of writing HLSL/ShaderLab manually
workarounds.how: Window > Shader Graph > create new shader; drag nodes instead of writing code

workarounds.action: Reduce shader complexity for mobile: fewer texture samples, simpler math
workarounds.how: Mobile GPUs have strict limits on interpolators and ALU instructions
